overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through open grasslands at night. The character travels along a dirt trail surrounded by scattered trees and bushes under a starry sky, briefly using binoculars to survey the landscape.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt trail through grassy field under starry sky

entered.detail: worn dirt path cutting through tall grass
deciduous trees with full foliage scattered across the landscape
prominent leafless tree silhouetted against the night sky
distant mountain silhouette on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grassland at night. The landscape features scattered trees, distant mountains, and a prominent dead tree silhouetted against the starry sky while the camera follows steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with denser tree cover on left

events.description: character briefly raises hand to head while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: continuing along trail with slight left turn, passing denser pine trees on the left side

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees becoming visible on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the trail curves slightly left, bringing taller pine trees into view on the left. The character briefly raises a hand to their head while maintaining forward momentum through the grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant tree line

events.description: character raises binoculars to eyes to scan the distant landscape

agents.ego_description: stops walking to survey the horizon with binoculars, then continues moving forward

segments.scene_description: The character slows and raises binoculars to scan the distant grassland and mountains. After observing, the character continues walking as the trail progresses through the open prairie with the large dead tree passing out of view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement behind a cowboy traversing a moonlit prairie that shifts from open grasslands to a more wooded trail. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path under a starry sky, passing a prominent dead tree silhouetted against distant mountains. As the trail curves slightly to the left, the open landscape gives way to taller pine trees that emerge on the periphery while the character briefly raises a hand to their head. The movement then slows as the character lifts binoculars to scan the horizon, before resuming a steady pace through the prairie as the dead tree recedes from view.
